profile.original_text: **AI Product Engineer** specializing in **manufacturing enterprise quality digitalization** and production AI systems. 4+ years building and shipping AI that automates mission-critical enterprise workflows — from agentic quality management (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, 8D) to real-time AI products at scale. I take systems from concept to production and optimize them relentlessly: latency, cost, reliability, and user outcomes. Multi-agent orchestration, tool-driven architectures, and memory systems. What I build doesn't just respond — it improves over time.
profile.rewritten_text: **AI Product Engineer** with 4+ years building and shipping production AI systems that automate mission-critical enterprise workflows — from agentic quality management (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, 8D) to real-time AI products at scale. I take systems from concept to production and optimize them relentlessly: latency, cost, reliability, and user outcomes. Multi-agent orchestration, tool-driven architectures, and memory systems. What I build doesn't just respond — it improves over time.
profile.change_reason: Removed redundant 'specializing in manufacturing enterprise quality digitalization' to broaden appeal for D2C roles.
claims_removed: specializing in manufacturing enterprise quality digitalization

skills.original_text: | Category | Technologies ||----------|-------------|| **Programming** | Python, SQL || **AI Systems & Agentic Architectures** | LLM APIs, RAG pipelines, embeddings, prompt engineering, tool calling, multi-model routing, agentic workflows, LangChain/LangGraph || **Backend & Real-Time Systems** | FastAPI, Redis (caching, queues), PostgreSQL, REST APIs, async pipelines, WebSockets, SSE streaming || **System Design & Orchestration** | Stateful systems, workflow orchestration, memory systems, context modeling, distributed pipelines || **Infra & Observability** | Docker, AWS, Fly.io, logging, tracing, metrics, performance optimization || **Data & Analytics** | ETL pipelines, data validation, Power BI, Tableau |

skills.change_reason: No changes needed; skills are accurate and relevant.

key_achievements.original_text:
- **Built Emote from zero:** Took product from vision to production, grew to 450+ users, achieved 13–15% weekly retention through continuous iteration.
- **Latency reduction:** Drove inference latency from ~15s → ~3s and cost from ~$1.20 → ~$0.023 per session at Emote.
- **Enterprise migration:** Led Azure to PostgreSQL data platform migration at Akkodis for Ericsson systems; recognized for improving reporting reliability and delivery.
- **Agentic manufacturing quality system:** Built production multi-agent AI for enterprise quality management (EQMS) at Omnex Systems — automates DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, and 8D across global manufacturing supply chains (12.5s → 8s latency).
